ip_outcome_note: Card name = species name = canonical Pokemon species. PokemonTCG.io confirms nationalPokedexNumbers: [262], species 'Mightyena'. Auto-verify applies.

trivia_bullets.text: Vivid Voltage (SWSH4) released November 13, 2020. Mightyena prints as a Stage 1 Darkness-type Uncommon (104/185), evolving from Poochyena. Regulation Mark D. [PokemonTCG.io API: swsh4]

Mightyena is National Pokedex no. 262, introduced in Generation III (Hoenn). Its design appears based on a hyena — possibly the brown or striped hyena, with the dorsal mane influencing the thick fur collar — and may also draw from dog breeds such as the German Shepherd and Australian Kelpie. Its name combines 'mighty' and 'hyena.' It evolves from Poochyena at level 18. [WebSearch snippet: Bulbapedia/Mightyena; pokemondb.net/pokedex/mightyena]
"It chases down prey in a pack of around ten. They defeat foes with perfectly coordinated teamwork." [PokemonTCG.io API: swsh4-104]

Mightyena was the signature Dark-type of Team Magma and Team Aqua grunts throughout the Gen 3 games and the Ruby/Sapphire anime arc. Both villainous organizations used Poochyena/Mightyena as their rank-and-file Pokemon, making the species one of the most visible Hoenn antagonist markers. [WebSearch snippet: Bulbapedia/Team Magma Grunt; TV Tropes/Pokemon Ruby and Sapphire Team Aqua and Team Magma]

This printing: Stage 1 Darkness-type, 110 HP, weak to Grass (x2), 1 retreat cost. Two attacks: Ferocious Bellow (1 Darkness, 20 damage + reduces opponent's next attack by 50) and Pitch-Black Fangs (3 energy, 100 damage). Artist: Aya Kusube. [PokemonTCG.io API: swsh4-104]
